message:
refactor(cli,conformance,orchestrator): eliminate boilerplate and dead code annotations

CLI (cli.rs):
- Add From<TtyAudioRecoveryPolicy> impl for DecodeRecoveryPolicy,
  replacing four identical manual match arms in main.rs with a single
  .into() call at each call site

Conformance (conformance.rs):
- Extract conformance_err() helper to DRY up the repeated
  FwError::Unsupported format string construction across all segment
  validation checks

Orchestrator (orchestrator.rs):
- Remove unused trace_id_str parameter from execute_backend() and
  its call site, eliminating a clippy::too_many_arguments suppression
- Move #[allow(dead_code)] from the Finalizer enum to specific
  variants (Process, Custom) that are only constructed in tests,
  keeping TempDir and run_all() properly visible
- Replace .unwrap() calls with .expect() providing invariant context
  in diarize_segments (best_cluster) and probe_system_health (engine_for)

Backend (backend/mod.rs):
- Replace bare .unwrap() with descriptive .expect() in health probe

Also updates .gitignore and Cargo.lock for dependency changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
